TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Yuma 口述 Hayung Sugiy 紀錄 === qalang Pyaway qani ga muci balay squ knitan ga, nanu yasa qu ini ptnaq squ kwara squ qalang binah nqu qalang qani. nanu yasa qu aring raral qani ga, bnkis qani ga wal i smi balay squ inlungan ru inrasan nqu a qalang Pyaway ru pcbaq squ laqi ka bnkis. nanu yasa qu cingay qu bnkis qani lga nanu wal mhoqil kwara la, aring squ 宋牧師 ru kwara squ 老師母 qani lga, si say mha ini ktwa qu bnkis ka nyux mqyanux squ Pyaway qani la. nanu yasa qu trang squ mrkyas cikay squ laqi qani ga, nanu cbaqan sami nqu bnkis musa i tmubux squ trakis, ===
S.PHON: juma ** ħajuŋ s~ɕuɣij ** === qalaŋ pjawaj qani ɣa muʦ~ʨi βalaj s~ɕqu knitan ɣa, nanu jas~ɕa qu ini ptnaq s~ɕqu kwara s~ɕqu qalaŋ βinaħ nqu qalaŋ qani. nanu jas~ɕa qu ariŋ raral qani ɣa, βnkis~ɕ qani ɣa wal i s~ɕmi βalaj s~ɕqu inluŋan ru inras~ɕan nqu a qalaŋ pjawaj ru pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕqu laqi ka βnkis~ɕ. nanu jas~ɕa qu ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu βnkis~ɕ qani lɣa nanu wal mħoqil kwara la, ariŋ s~ɕqu *** ru kwara s~ɕqu *** qani lɣa, s~ɕi s~ɕaj mħa ini ktwa qu βnkis~ɕ ka njux mqjanux s~ɕqu pjawaj qani la. nanu jas~ɕa qu traŋ s~ɕqu mrkjas~ɕ ʦ~ʨikaj s~ɕqu laqi qani ɣa, nanu ʦ~ʨβaqan s~ɕami nqu βnkis~ɕ mus~ɕa i tmuβux s~ɕqu trakis~ɕ, ===
S.FORM: Yuma 口述 Hayung Sugiy 紀錄 === qalang Pyaway qani ga muci balay squ knitan ga, nanu yasa qu ini ptnaq squ kwara squ qalang binah nqu qalang qani. nanu yasa qu aring raral qani ga, bnkis qani ga wal i smi balay squ inlungan ru inrasan nqu a qalang Pyaway ru pcbaq squ laqi ka bnkis. nanu yasa qu cingay qu bnkis qani lga nanu wal mhoqil kwara la, aring squ 宋牧師 ru kwara squ 老師母 qani lga, si say mha ini ktwa qu bnkis ka nyux mqyanux squ Pyaway qani la. nanu yasa qu trang squ mrkyas cikay squ laqi qani ga, nanu cbaqan sami nqu bnkis musa i tmubux squ trakis, ===
S.PHON: juma ** ħajuŋ s~ɕuɣij ** === qalaŋ pjawaj qani ɣa muʦ~ʨi βalaj s~ɕqu knitan ɣa, nanu jas~ɕa qu ini ptnaq s~ɕqu kwara s~ɕqu qalaŋ βinaħ nqu qalaŋ qani. nanu jas~ɕa qu ariŋ raral qani ɣa, βnkis~ɕ qani ɣa wal i s~ɕmi βalaj s~ɕqu inluŋan ru inras~ɕan nqu a qalaŋ pjawaj ru pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕqu laqi ka βnkis~ɕ. nanu jas~ɕa qu ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu βnkis~ɕ qani lɣa nanu wal mħoqil kwara la, ariŋ s~ɕqu *** ru kwara s~ɕqu *** qani lɣa, s~ɕi s~ɕaj mħa ini ktwa qu βnkis~ɕ ka njux mqjanux s~ɕqu pjawaj qani la. nanu jas~ɕa qu traŋ s~ɕqu mrkjas~ɕ ʦ~ʨikaj s~ɕqu laqi qani ɣa, nanu ʦ~ʨβaqan s~ɕami nqu βnkis~ɕ mus~ɕa i tmuβux s~ɕqu trakis~ɕ, ===
